summary: All 4 features tested and working correctly. 1) Collapsible pinned post - X button visible, collapse/expand works, localStorage persistence with key 'hg_pin_collapsed_{id}'. 2) Notification preferences - Settings card with 3 options (All, Following, None), API updates correctly. 3) Password modal - Triggered by 'password' button next to email, has all 3 fields. 4) Old 'Update Password' card removed from Settings.

backend_api_tests.test_update_notification_preference_foll: PASS - PUT /api/auth/me with notification_preference='following' updates correctly
backend_api_tests.test_update_notification_preference_none: PASS - PUT /api/auth/me with notification_preference='none' updates correctly
backend_api_tests.test_update_notification_preference_all: PASS - PUT /api/auth/me with notification_preference='all' updates correctly
backend_api_tests.test_verify_notification_preference_pers: PASS - Notification preference persists after update
backend_api_tests.test_update_password_wrong_current: PASS - Returns 400 for wrong current password
backend_api_tests.test_update_password_success: PASS - Password update works, login with new password works

frontend_settings_page_tests.old_password_card_removed: PASS - No visible 'Update Password' card on settings page
frontend_settings_page_tests.password_button_next_to_email: PASS - data-testid='update-password-btn' found next to email
frontend_settings_page_tests.password_modal_opens: PASS - data-testid='password-modal' opens on button click

frontend_feed_pinned_post_tests.expand_clears_localStorage: PASS - localStorage key removed when expanded

critical_code_review_comments: HivePostCard.js correctly implements collapsible pinned post with localStorage persistence using key 'hg_pin_collapsed_{id}'
SettingsPage.js correctly implements notification preferences card with 3 radio-style buttons
Password update moved from card to modal triggered by button next to email - good UX
Backend auth.py correctly handles notification_preference in update_me and _build_user_response
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested 4 features: 1) Collapsible pinned post uses localStorage key 'hg_pin_collapsed_{id}', toggle button has data-testid='pinned-toggle-{id}'. 2) Notification preferences in Settings card with 3 options - data-testids: notif-pref-all, notif-pref-following, notif-pref-none. 3) Password modal triggered by data-testid='update-password-btn' button next to email. 4) Old Update Password card removed from Settings. Login uses access_token field. Admin: kmklodnicki@gmail.com / HoneyGroove2026

collapsible_pinned_post.behavior: X button collapses to show only 'pinned post' bar, ChevronDown expands
